mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY total_solved_questions DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (user_id, username, level, exp, consecutive_days, total_solved_questions, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{level}, #{exp}, #{consecutiveDays}, #{totalSolvedQuestions}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET level = #{level}, exp = #{exp}, consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays}, total_solved_questions = #{totalSolvedQuestions}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
